verified_structural.title: Salt curing — water activity (a_w) ≤ 0.85 blocks pathogen growth

verified_structural.situation: Why does going up by fifths -- C, G, D, A, E, B, F#, C#, G#, D#, A#, F -- pass through every one of the twelve notes and return exactly to C, making a closed CIRCLE? The engine shows it is a fact of number theory. number_theory confirmed a fifth is 7 semitones and gcd(7,12) = 1: the step size is coprime to the twelve-n

trail.detail: gcd(7,12)=1 (fifth generates all 12 pitch classes); gcd(3,12)=3 (minor third closes after 4)
7k mod 12 hits 0,7,2,9,4,11,6,1,8,3,10,5 then returns at k=12; 3k mod 12 closes at k=4

verified_structural.title: A lens, parallel resistors, and the harmonic mean: reciprocals add
verified_structural.situation: Put an object 3 m in front of a lens of focal length 2 m and the optics verifier confirms the image forms at 6 m -- because the thin-lens equation is 1/f = 1/do + 1/di, here 1/2 = 1/3 + 1/6. The mathematics verifier confirms that very identity: 1/3 + 1/6 = 1/2. The point is the SHAPE of the law -- not the quantities ad

trail.detail: thin lens 1/f=1/do+1/di: f=2 m, do=3 m, di=6 m (1/2=1/3+1/6)
reciprocal-addition identity 1/3+1/6=1/2

verified_structural.title: Light plus light equals light: relativistic velocity addition
verified_structural.situation: In everyday life speeds add: walk 3 mph on a 50 mph train and the ground sees 53. Relativity replaces that with w = (u+v)/(1 + u*v/c^2), and the mathematics verifier confirmed three exact consequences (working in units of c, so c=1): (1) half light-speed plus half light-speed is NOT c but 4/5 c -- (1/2+1/2)/(1+1/4)=4/5

trail.detail: velocity composition keeps every frame under c and pins light at c in all frames (special relativity)

verified_structural.title: Relativistic Doppler: approaching light doubles, receding halves, the product is one
verified_structural.situation: Move toward a light source and its frequency rises (blueshift); move away and it falls (redshift). Relativity sets the exact factor at sqrt((1+b)/(1-b)) with b=v/c. The mathematics verifier confirmed three exact facts at b=3/5: approaching, the factor is sqrt((8/5)/(2/5))=sqrt(4)=2 -- the frequency DOUBLES; receding, i

trail.detail: relativistic Doppler: blueshift approaching, redshift receding, with the extra gamma factor of special relativity

verified_structural.title: E=mc^2: matter is frozen energy, confirmed two ways
verified_structural.situation: The most famous equation says mass and energy are the same thing in different clothes, and two independent verifiers agree. The physics_dimensional verifier confirmed that E = m*c^2 is genuinely an ENERGY -- joule = kilogram*(meter/second)^2, the units balance. The mathematics verifier confirmed the staggering NUMBER i

trail.detail: E=m*c^2: both sides reduce to kg*m^2/s^2 (joule) - dimensionally an energy

verified_structural.title: The Schwarzschild radius: every mass has a horizon, set only by its mass
verified_structural.situation: General relativity says that if you compress any mass M inside a radius r_s = 2GM/c^2, not even light escapes -- a black hole. Two independent verifiers confirmed the structure of that formula. The physics_dimensional verifier confirmed r_s = 2GM/c^2 is dimensionally a LENGTH (both sides reduce to meters), so the formu

trail.detail: r_s = 2*G*M/c**2: both sides reduce to meter (the formula is a radius)
r_s(Sun)/r_s(Earth) = M(Sun)/M(Earth) exactly (2G/c^2 cancels) -- horizon proportional to mass

verified_structural.title: Mendel ratios are probability: 3:1 is 3/4 vs 1/4, and 9:3:3:1 is independence squared
verified_structural.situation: Mendel famous ratios are not biological mysteries but plain probability, and the engine confirmed it. mathematics confirmed the monohybrid law: cross two hybrids (Aa x Aa) and the four equally likely offspring are 1 AA, 2 Aa, 1 aa, so the chance of the DOMINANT phenotype is 1/4 + 1/2 = 3/4 and the recessive is 1/4 -- t

trail.detail: two traits independent (3/4 each, joint 9/16) -- Mendel independent assortment

verified_structural.title: Shor factors 15 -- the quantum result, checked in two domains
verified_structural.situation: 15 was the first number ever factored on a quantum computer (IBM, 2001), by Shor's algorithm. The engine verified the whole result end to end. Shor reduces factoring to PERIOD-FINDING (the quantum part) plus a GCD (pure number theory). Pick a=2: the order of 2 modulo 15 is r=4, because 2^4 = 16 = 1 (mod 15), and r is e

trail.detail: order of 2 mod 15 is r=4 (2^4=16=1 mod 15, even): valid Shor period; extraction gives factors 3,5

verified_structural.title: Quantum, narrowed and verified -- the moat rides a physical law

verified_structural.title: Multivitamin (general daily) — modest cancer signal, null cardiovascular, healthy diet still primary
verified_structural.situation: A daily multivitamin/multimineral provides 50–200% RDA of major nutrients in one pill. trail.detail: Provides RDA of major micronutrients in one pill (chemistry is reliable)

verified_structural.title: Parabolic solar cooker — geometric focal-point concentration
verified_structural.situation: A parabolic reflector with focal length f, paraboloid equation y = x²/(4f), reflects parallel sun rays to a single focal point. At 1 m² aperture and 800 W/m² insolation, focal-point irradiance reaches 80+ kW/m² (theoretical) and 5–50 kW/m² practical; cooking temperatures exceed 200°C; water boils in 5–15 minutes.

trail.detail: Paraboloid focuses parallel rays at the focal point (defining property)
1 m² × 800 W/m² × 50% optical efficiency ÷ small focal area → cooking temperatures
